name: okto-frontends
description: npm workspace root for okto's JS frontends (mobile, desktop) and shared @okto/ui.

comments.overrides: Force a single React across the workspace. react-native (hoisted) binds the Fabric renderer to whichever react sits at the root; without this, desktop's range floats react/react-dom to a newer patch than mobile's pin and npm keeps two copies, causing 'Invalid hook call / more than one copy of React'. Keep this aligned with react-native's peer range.
